title: Sample Loop Project
requirements:
# Requirements

Build a tiny notes app with local persistence.
design:
# Design

Use local storage and provide reviewable implementation evidence.

tasks.title: Design notes UI
tasks.description: Define the notes UI structure and acceptance criteria.

tasks.title: Build notes UI
tasks.description: Implement the notes UI in an isolated workspace.

tasks.title: Review notes UI
tasks.description: Review implementation evidence and decide whether it can be marked done.
